_meta.description: Interior design brand video. Based on Livitum v11 final. Split-screen before/after intro + designer speaking + b-roll showcase + animated EndCard with Trustpilot social proof.

sections.name: reveal
sections.notes: Split-screen: top=before/render/after wipe animation, bottom=b-roll clip. Top expands to cover bottom at end.

sections.name: hook
sections.notes: First b-roll clip at full frame. VO playing: Te ayudaré / Transformamos / etc.

sections.name: intro+showcase
sections.notes: Designer on camera (intro) then CONTINUOUS audio into b-roll intercuts (showcase). ONE audio take, visual cuts at phrase boundaries.

sections.name: cta
sections.notes: Designer on camera. CTA + closing phrase. Hold 1s.

sections.name: endcard
sections.notes: Remotion: logo appears centered → slides left → text reveals → Trustpilot badge.

lessons_learned: Audio: always cut at word_timestamps, never segment level. Add 30ms fade-in to remove bleed.
Crop: always face-detect for vertical reframe. Never arithmetic center.
Subtitles: FontSize=10-12 for 1080x1920. Always test on real frame.
LowerThird: use drawtext, not Remotion+colorkey. Position at y=1350 to avoid subtitle overlap.
EndCard: use REAL logo PNG. Never recreate in SVG. Overflow-hidden mask for text reveal.
Split-screen: use Remotion for wipe animation, Python cv2 for expansion compositing.
Layer order: growing layer must be overlaid LAST (on top).
SAR: always setsar=1 after any scale. Always verify with ffprobe.
Audio: never use afade=t=out for mid-stream fixes. It kills all subsequent audio.
-shortest: always verify output duration isn't truncating speech.

expansion.notes: After wipe completes, top image grows from 1060→1920px. Use Python cv2 frame-by-frame: overlay después on split-screen base, growing height each frame.

clips.notes: Full-frame b-roll. VO plays over this.
ONE audio file. Visual cuts happen independently. J-cut: audio continues over b-roll.
Same face crop as intro. Hold 1s after last word.
Use REAL logo PNG. Icon starts centered, wrapper expands to reveal text. No separate orange circle. Trustpilot in official green-box-star format.
